name: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.
h1: Advanced Micro Devices's GCC footprint in India
lede: Advanced Micro Devices runs three centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Hyderabad, covering R&D and engineering & design, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Advanced Micro Devices office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Advanced Micro Devices GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Advanced Micro Devices runs 3 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Hyderabad), covering R&D and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Advanced Micro Devices's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Hyderabad, spanning R&D and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 100 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Advanced Micro Devices operates 3 active centers in India.

faq.a: Advanced Micro Devices's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 1 additional cities.

faq.a: Advanced Micro Devices runs R&D and 1 additional center types centers in India.
